title: extract_first_identifier_arg_ast nested-constructor descent extension
scope: Java + Scala only (Cpp DEFERRED to cpp-deser-declaration-v1 per premortem amendment A1)
implementation_summary: Added per-language descend-through set match before the existing arg-list iteration: Java { object_creation_expression, method_invocation, parenthesized_expression }; Scala { call_expression, instance_expression, infix_expression }; default empty.
After the direct-identifier-extraction attempt for each named child fails, if child kind is in descend_kinds, invoke extract_first_identifier_arg_ast_descent.

New private fn extract_first_identifier_arg_ast_descent: BFS over named descendants in source order (push children in reverse, pop leftmost first); bounded recursion depth 5; string_node_kinds(language) filter applied at every BFS step (preserves closes-#24 regression-guard); identifier-validation matches outer helper (split('.').next(), trim_start_matches('&'/'$'), is_valid_identifier).

Cpp arm OMITTED per validator mandate m2_cpp_excluded — premortem REFUTED Hypothesis A; actual cpp shape is `declaration → init_declarator → argument_list` and helper cannot reach the argument_list. Deferred to follow-on milestone cpp-deser-declaration-v1.

validator_mandates_observed.m2_no_public_api_change: PASS — extract_first_identifier_arg_ast signature unchanged; new sub-helper is private
validator_mandates_observed.m2_no_new_variants: PASS — no new TaintSourceType / TaintSinkType / VulnType variants
validator_mandates_observed.m2_string_kind_filter_at_every_level: PASS — string_kinds.contains check at outer arg-list iteration AND at every BFS step inside descent helper
validator_mandates_observed.m2_cpp_excluded: PASS — descend_kinds match has Java + Scala arms only; default `_ => &[]` covers Cpp

loc_delta_estimate: +~100 LOC source (helper extension + new sub-helper + doc-comment block)
next_milestone: M3 verification + binary smoke + GREEN-regression sweep
